message:
fix(freeze): handle string/object pointers in native toJSValueWasm32

- Add proper handling for PTR (object) and STR (string) tags in native toJSValueWasm32
- Previously returned UNDEFINED for all reference types, breaking strings in frozen functions
- Use dummy args buffer instead of null for apply opcode with undefined/null args
- Fixes RxJS pipe() and Zod safeParse() Symbol.iterator errors
